event.title: Discussion: How should corporations support OSS maintainers?
event.metaTitle: Discussion: How should corporations support OSS maintainers?
event.metaDesc: An open discussion on how corporations can support OSS maintainers, including which programs work today, how they can improve, and what is missing.
event.content:
This meetup will be facilitated as an open discussion focused on how corporations can best support OSS maintainers today.
What programs most effectively support maintainers today and why? How can they be improved? What’s missing?
